ValidationRule.description: Confirming Bank Address (English) cannot be Null.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName ='LC', Credit_Insurance_Confirmation_Y_N__c =True,ISNULL( Issuing_Bank_Address_English__c )), TRUE, FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: There is the Credit Insurance Confirmation,Confirming Bank Address (English) Cannot be Empty !
